<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at main -->

## What's Changed

### Changes
* feat(analytics): track only authenticated pageviews via TelemetryDeck JS SDK by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4800

### Other Changes
* chore(deps): replace connected-react-router with redux-first-history by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4750
* chore(ci): bump architect-orb to 8.0.2 by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4738
* chore(deps): pin patched versions of vulnerable transitive deps by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4742
* chore(deps): bump react-markdown to 9.1.0 and pin mdast-util-to-hast by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4744
* chore(deps): bump `@rjsf` packages to 5.24.13 by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4745
* chore(deps): remove validate.js (dead code) by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4748
* feat(ci): add workflow to audit dependencies by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4749
* fix(deps): pin form-data to ^4.0.4 via yarn resolution by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4753
* fix(deps): pin ws to ^8.17.1 via yarn resolution by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4754
* fix(renovate): remove schedule, increase concurrency by @marians in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4755
* chore: align files according to platform standards in https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4799 https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4770 https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4714 https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4722 https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4802 https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/pull/4724

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/giantswarm/happa/compare/v1.72.2...v1.72.3
